framework.IMPROVE_INTO_UNIQUE_PAGE: Has keyword demand, can be turned into unique content
framework.CANONICALIZE_REVIEW: Duplicate of parent — review canonicalizing to parent calculator
framework.NOINDEX_REVIEW: No value, harms crawl budget — review noindex
framework.REMOVE_FROM_SITEMAP_REVIEW: Remove from sitemap, page remains accessible

pattern_finding: All audited tools are parameterized duplicates. They pre-fill the parent calculator with specific inputs (amount, term, rate) but add no unique content, examples, FAQs, or value beyond what the parent calculator provides.
safe_next_step: Remove 5 tools/week from sitemap after Auditor + Guardian approval. Do NOT mass-remove all 225 at once.
